new_javadoc:
/**
     * Converters value pair into a register pair.
     *
     * @param lhs {@code this} object.
     * @param rhs the other object.
     * @return the pair.
     */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java
--- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java
+++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/builder/AbstractReflection.java
@@ -0,0 +159,13 @@
+        return false;
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Converters value pair into a register pair.
+     *
+     * @param lhs {@code this} object.
+     * @param rhs the other object.
+     * @return the pair.
+     */
+    static Pair<IDKey, IDKey> toRegisterPair(final Object lhs, final Object rhs) {
+        return Pair.of(new IDKey(lhs), new IDKey(rhs));
+    }
commit_message: CompareToBuilder lacks cycle guard on Object[] recursion. (#1669)
